A chorus girl (Vera-Ellen) stars in a broke producer's (Cesar Romero) show after rumors link her with a millionaire (David Niven) in Scotland.
programme.title: Happy Go Lovely

programme.desc: Oscar-winning adaptation of the Broadway hit about an English professor (Rex Harrison) who teaches a cockney merchant (Audrey Hepburn) to be a lady.
programme.title: My Fair Lady

programme.desc: A doctor (John Forsythe) sets an expiration date with a rich patient's (Richard Kiley) wife (Reta Shaw).
programme.title: Murder Once Removed

programme.desc: Friends (Guy Madison, Kim Novak, Brian Keith) join a college student's scheme to rob a Reno casino for kicks.
programme.title: 5 Against the House

programme.desc: A New Yorker and her four sons experience love and laughter from their opinionated but well-meaning family patriarch.
programme.title: Life With Father

programme.desc: Gentle Dr. Jekyll (Spencer Tracy) tests a serum on himself, releasing vicious alter-ego Mr. Hyde on 19th-century London. Prowling the town, Hyde ventures to a music hall and encounters Ivy (Ingrid Bergman), whom he takes forcibly as his mistress.
programme.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde

programme.desc: After being shot in a gunfight, Hopalong Cassidy sets out to settle the war between cattlemen who each accuse the other of stealing their livestock.
programme.title: Hopalong Cassidy Enters

programme.desc: A folksy New England poet (Gary Cooper) inherits $20 million he doesn't want and tells a New York newswoman (Jean Arthur) why.
programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes to Town

programme.desc: In a society where life ends at age 30, a law enforcement officer known as a Sandman (Michael York) flees with another 30-year-old (Jenny Agutter) when he learns his number has come up prematurely.
programme.title: Logan's Run

programme.desc: Scout William F. Cody (Joel McCrea) marries a U.S. senator's daughter (Maureen O'Hara), fights the Cheyenne and leads a Wild West show.
programme.title: Buffalo Bill

programme.desc: A French TV newswoman (Joanna Lumley) interviews friends and foes of the missing Inspector Clouseau (Peter Sellers).
programme.title: Trail of the Pink Panther

programme.desc: Wandering gunfighter Joe arrives in the Mexican village of San Miguel in the midst of a power struggle among sheriff John Baxter and the three Rojo brothers. He is hired by Esteban Rojo to join their gang, but he plays one side against the other.
programme.title: A Fistful of Dollars

programme.desc: Engaged to others, two cruise-ship passengers (Cary Grant, Deborah Kerr) plan to reunite six months later atop the Empire State Building.
programme.title: An Affair to Remember

programme.desc: A sheriff's meek wife (Vera Miles) makes a run for the Mexican border with an outlaw (Sam Elliott) her husband was going to hang.
programme.title: Molly and Lawless John

programme.desc: A harmonica player (James Stewart) woos a landlady's daughter (Paulette Goddard) and joins a conductor's (Horace Heidt) orchestra.
programme.title: Pot o' Gold

programme.desc: Ax murders follow a heart attack at an Irish castle full of mourners (William Campbell, Luana Anders, Bart Patton).
programme.title: Dementia 13

programme.desc: In order to help bring Nazis to justice, a U.S. agent brings a traitor's daughter to Rio de Janeiro to seduce an exiled Nazi.
programme.title: Notorious

programme.desc: When a dirty Scotland Yard cop is linked to a string of robberies across Europe, the agency asks a famous French detective (Alan Arkin) to help them find the culprits.
programme.title: Inspector Clouseau

programme.desc: A runaway wife (Madge Evans), a fugitive (Bruce Cabot) and other plane-crash survivors find a hermit's (John Boles) island.
programme.title: Sinners in Paradise

programme.desc: A student hooker (Annie Potts) in a van picks up a Las Vegas-bound teen (Mark Hamill) on the trail of a stolen Stingray.
programme.title: Corvette Summer

programme.desc: A man in black (Yul Brynner) recruits six hired guns to lead Mexican villagers against the gang of an outlaw (Eli Wallach).
programme.title: The Magnificent Seven

programme.desc: A poor Chicago secretary (Diana Ross) takes the fast lane to fame as a model and a fashion designer.
programme.title: Mahogany

S01 E104 — Woman in Headlights Officers locate a suspect wanted in a hit-and-run, but he resists arrest; a woman is arrested for stealing her roommate's car and claiming the girl let her borrow it.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E106 — It Wasn't Me An intoxicated and belligerent man is arrested for refusing to leave a fast food restaurant when asked to get out; a domestic disturbance call is made when a female reports her husband threw her down the stairs.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E107 — Dual Personalities A couple in a car gets in an argument over who should pay for the meal but when the officer approaches them, he finds crystal meth in the male's backpack; a female gets a DUI after swerving all over the road and hitting curbs.

programme.title: Breakthrough with Rod Parsley
programme.desc: Breakthrough is the worldwide soul-winning media ministry of Rod Parsley, advancing the kingdom of God around the world through the eye of the camera. programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: Concepts Of Faith with Charles Capps
programme.desc: ArkansasFarmer, Charles Capps and family discovered that the spiritual truths Jesustaught could be applied to the everyday circumstances of life and change it!The practical teaching of how to do that is needed and relevant for everyonetoday. Charles, wife Peggy and daughter Annette share life changing truths.

programme.title: Brian & Bobbie Houston - JesusFollowers.TV
programme.desc: "What greater honour and testimony is there than to be a devotedand passionate follower of the Lord Jesus Christ. Bobbie and I believe in the Church, thelocal church and the power and blessing of being planted (Psalm 92). We alsobelieve that in this day and age, God is creating multiple ways to water theseeds and greatness of calling within. Jesusfollowers.TV is here towelcome and extend our table of life and experience to you. This onlineplatform is here to love, encourage, and be a trustworthy voice of hope andinspiration in the days ahead. Our heart is to serve the God-given potentialwithin you and the Body of Christ. As Eph 2:21-22 says, we are all beingbuilt into a holy habitation for the Living God - brick by brick, stone bystone, with Jesus Christ as the Chief Cornerstone. May Jesusfollowers.TV be ablessing to you and those you care for” Brian and Bobbie Houston

Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.desc: Paula Today Paula White-Cain along with her husband, Jonathan Cain discuss real life situations and offer practical, Biblical solutions. About Paula Paula White-Cain is the President of Paula White Ministries and City of Destiny headquartered in Apopka, Florida, and the spiritual advisor to President Donald Trump. She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She is a leading Pastor, a renowned life coach, bestselling author, and highly sought-after motivational speaker. Paula’s commitment to humanity is felt worldwide as she reaches out through numerous charities and compassion ministries, fulfilling her mission and call to transform lives, heal hearts and win souls. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.title: The Counter Culture Mom Show
programme.desc: Former Hollywood actress, pop culture expert, Tina Griffin, left her Wisconsin dairy farm at the age of 20 and headed to Hollywood, CA to earn a BA in Film and Television broadcasting from California State University - Los Angeles. She’s traveled globally for the past 20 years delivering her eye-opening show, Hollywood Exposed https://counterculturemom.com/adult-session/ , explaining the real agenda behind the entertainment industry and its impact on the foundational development of today’s youth. Besides being in countless movies, Tina has worked on TV shows such as Jimmy Kimmel Live!, Young and the Restless, Days of Our Lives, Lizzie McGuire, Drake and Josh, and Malcolm in the Middle, competed in the Miss America pageant and worked at the OSCARS. She was involved with the Film Society as well as Women in Film and an active member of the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (AFTRA). She has opened for bands such as Colton Dixon, Third Day, and Jeremy Camp. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: Concepts of Faith
programme.desc: Arkansas farmer, Charles Capps and family discovered that the spiritual truths Jesustaught could be applied to the everyday circumstances of life and change it!The practical teaching of how to do that is needed and relevant for everyonetoday. Charles, wife Peggy and daughter Annette share life changing truths.

programme.title: Worldview Matters
programme.desc: David Fiorazo is an author, ordained pastor, truth proclaimer, media contributor, and podcaster. Since the1990’s David has been working in both TV and radio broadcasting and in Christian ministry. On Worldview Matters, Fiorazo and expert guests tackle current events, demonic agendas &movements, and controversial topics including church & state issues, religious freedom, the culture war, Bible prophecy, education, politics, media& more.

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: The Jim Bakker Show
programme.desc: The Jim Bakker Show is an hour-long daily Christian broadcast that is aired throughout the United States, Canada, and the entire world through multiple broadcasts on Pioneer Network, Directv, Dish Network and other world wide satellites, and the PTL Television Network. Join Jim and Lori as they bring to the stage today’s greatest prophets, health experts, and leaders of the Christian world to discuss and understand Biblical prophecy and the Revelations of Gods Word.

programme.title: World Impact With Dr. Billy Wilson
programme.desc: Each week Voice of Salvation Ministries presents World Impact with Dr. Billy Wilson, canvassing the globe with the gospel. The program’s unique, contemporary format offers a clear evangelistic call to a relationship with Jesus Christ. Twenty episodes are recorded yearly, both in the studio facilities and field locations around the world. For more information: WorldImpact.tv http://worldimpact.tv/

programme.title: VFI News
programme.desc: VFI News with Barry Segal brings you timely, insightful reports on Israel, the Middle East, andglobal events - analysed through a biblical and prophetic lens.

programme.title: Brian & Bobbie Houston - JesusFollowers.TV
programme.desc: "What greater honour and testimony is there than to be a devotedand passionate follower of the Lord Jesus Christ. Bobbie and I believe in the Church, thelocal church and the power and blessing of being planted (Psalm 92). We alsobelieve that in this day and age, God is creating multiple ways to water theseeds and greatness of calling within. Jesusfollowers.TV is here towelcome and extend our table of life and experience to you. This onlineplatform is here to love, encourage, and be a trustworthy voice of hope andinspiration in the days ahead. Our heart is to serve the God-given potentialwithin you and the Body of Christ. As Eph 2:21-22 says, we are all beingbuilt into a holy habitation for the Living God - brick by brick, stone bystone, with Jesus Christ as the Chief Cornerstone. May Jesusfollowers.TV be ablessing to you and those you care for” Brian and Bobbie Houston

programme.title: Victory With Paul Daugherty
programme.desc: Pastor Paul Daugherty and his wife Ashley lead a new generation with a practical, life-transforming message; a message of love, hope, healing and forgiveness.

programme.title: Paula Today with Paula White-Cain
programme.desc: Paula Today Paula White-Cain along with her husband, Jonathan Cain discuss real life situations and offer practical, Biblical solutions. Down-to-earth, refreshing, sometimes unfiltered and always sharing the life-changing love of Jesus thru Paula’s in-depth teaching or Jon’s anointed music. About Paula Paula White-Cain is the President of Paula White Ministries and City of Destiny headquartered in Apopka, Florida, and the spiritual advisor to President Donald Trump. She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She is a leading Pastor, a renowned life coach, bestselling author, and highly sought-after motivational speaker. Paula’s commitment to humanity is felt worldwide as she reaches out through numerous charities and compassion ministries, fulfilling her mission and call to transform lives, heal hearts and win souls. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.
